title: Unlocking Programmatic Tool Calling with Claude: Boost Your Workflow
description:
In this video, we dive deep into the transformative capabilities of programmatic tool calling with Claude. Discover how this powerful feature allows Claude to execute code that directly interacts with external tools, streamlining your workflow like never before. By eliminating the need for round trips to the model for each tool invocation, programmatic tool calling significantly reduces latency, making multi-tool workflows faster and more efficient.

Learn how this feature not only enhances performance but also decreases token consumption by enabling data filtering or processing before it enters the model's context window. We’ll guide you through the requirements for enabling this feature, including the necessity of the code execution tool. 

It's important to note that programmatic tool calling is subject to standard data retention policies, rather than Zero Data Retention (ZDR) policies, so you'll have clarity on data handling.

We'll also explore how to utilize the Claude API and Microsoft Foundry to access this feature effectively. Watch as we showcase a practical example of querying a database multiple times and aggregating the results using the API call in a cURL command format, complete with necessary headers and data structure.

Whether you’re a developer or a tech enthusiast looking to optimize your usage of Claude, this video will equip you with the knowledge to harness the full potential of programmatic tool calling. Don't forget to like, subscribe, and hit the bell icon for more insights on maximizing your tech tools!
thumbnail_suggestions: Data processing made easy with Claude
